Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows poor glycemic control (elevated HbA1c and glucose), and dyslipidemia with high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are within normal limits. Recommend optimization of diabetes and lipid management.
